title: United States forces Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
summary: The US government orders suspension of access to Anthropic's AI models for foreign citizens, sparking debate on artificial intelligence regulation.

title: World Cup coverage: schedules, deals and controversies
summary: Media provide information on match schedules, TV deals and the Haiti shirt controversy.

title: Cybersecurity: critical vulnerability in Splunk, FBI simulations and vehicle security
summary: A flaw allowing remote code execution in Splunk is discovered, the FBI builds a town to train cyberattacks, and security issues reported in Honda updates.

title: Health: new treatments and debunking myths
summary: New ingredient approved in sunscreens, advances against pancreatic cancer, and debunking myths like digestion cut and caffeine.

title: New devices and hardware issues
summary: Announcements of iPhone 18 Pro, LG monitor, Steam Machine, CORSAIR connector merger and a speaker under the pillow for sleeping.

title: Regulations: animal welfare law, tobacco prices, statistical noise and rent control
summary: New rules in Spain on dogs in bars and tobacco, noise prohibition in US census, and study on rent control.

title: Artificial intelligence strategies in companies: Microsoft, Meta and KPMG
summary: Microsoft CEO admits token addiction, Meta changes its AI management and KPMG withdraws a report due to hallucinations.

title: US attorneys general investigate OpenAI
summary: A coalition of state attorneys general has opened an investigation into OpenAI's practices.

title: TV deals in Spain: sales at El Corte Inglés and PcComponentes
summary: Big discounts on Samsung, LG and other brand TVs at major Spanish outlets.

title: Launch of new artificial intelligence models
summary: Models like Count Anything, Gemini-SQL2, Kimi K2.7, SkillOpt and GLM 5.2 break records in performance and efficiency.

title: Business moves: Meta backs out of deal and Andrew Yang bets on cost of living
summary: Meta withdraws from a $2B deal with Manus, and Andrew Yang proposes reducing the cost of living as a business opportunity.

title: Energy news: biomass, pipelines and urban cooling
summary: Spain seeks to use biomass against fires, Europe looks to Africa for gas, and Paris uses an underground cooling system.

title: Scientific discoveries: ancient genome duplication, eclipse and wildlife
summary: Research on genome duplication that formed complex brains, solar eclipse and curiosities like a seashell island and tracking wild boars.

title: Useful features and settings for mobile devices
summary: How to activate VoLTE, use AirDrop on Android, and other features like the blue dot and eSIM on O2.

title: Opinion and analysis articles on technology, work and society
summary: Reflections on the usefulness of master's degrees, the evolution of mobile phones, and tips to improve productivity and well-being.

title: Court rules Google liable for false statements by its AI
summary: A court determines that Google can be held liable for content generated by AI Overviews.

title: Open source projects and retrocomputing
summary: From running Half-Life on ReactOS to building VGA consoles and exploring Arabic typography, free software remains active.

title: Video games: Steam Machine and GTA VI rumors
summary: Valve begins sending Steam Machine units for review, and rumors emerge about a gasoline system in GTA VI.

title: Historical and cultural curiosities
summary: From Romans using flip-flops in public baths to the history of the baby bottle and the legacy of the Industrial Revolution.

title: Streaming programming and offers on Movistar
summary: Movistar Plus adds channels with movies and additional platforms are offered from the original apps.
